nasb.text: And not only this, but we also exult in God through our Lord Jesus Christ, through whom we have now received the reconciliation.

esv.text: More than that, we also rejoice in God through our Lord Jesus Christ, through whom we have now received reconciliation.

cnv.text: 不但這樣，我們現在已經藉著我們的主耶穌基督與　神復和，也藉著他以　神為榮。

ccb.text: 不但如此，我们借着主耶稣基督与上帝和好之后，还要借着祂在上帝面前欢喜。

csbs.text: 不仅如此，我们现在藉着主耶稣基督与神和好了，就更要藉着他以神夸耀。
